title: Artificial rain isn’t a solution to drought, according to a cloud-seeding expert
abstract: Artificial rain isn’t a solution to drought, according to a cloud-seeding expert may be niche, but it solves its target problem with focus and precision. In the fast-moving AI space, specialized to...
abstract_zh: 人工降雨这招儿在干旱面前只是个临时救急，云播种专家这么告诉我们。不过嘛，它就像个精准的小目标狙击手，专治局部缺水。快节奏的AI界里，它就是那个低调而有效的存在！
